problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Quantum tunneling through energy barrier is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
